description: Letter addressed to a certain ʿIzz al-Dīn. In Judaeo-Arabic. Yemeni origin. Dating: uncertain, likely no earlier than 13th century. Dealing mainly with details of shipments of different kinds of grains in different kinds of containers, including shipping grain to Ṣanʿāʾ and a delivery to "the house of the dome" (bayt al-qubba). Mentions several names including ʿAbd al-Munʿim, Ḥusayn, Zayd, Muḥammad b. al-Ḥājj, Ṣāliḥ b. ʿAlī, Sulaymān al-Sharāʿī (? אלשראעי), and the sender's son Sālim. There seems to have been a theft of the grain from its underground storage (al-madfan), and much of the letter is a description of how they investigated this. The sender concludes by emphasizing that he has never betrayed a secret to anyone.
description_he: מכתב לעז אל-דין מסוים. ביהודית-ערבית. ממוצא תימני. כנראה לא לפני המאה ה-13. עוסק בעיקר בפרטי משלוחי דגנים שונים בכלים שונים, כולל שליחת דגן לצנעא. מתואר גם חקירה על גנבת דגן ממחסן תת-קרקעי.
